completed_tasks.name: FlightController arcade model incl. reverse + mouse-toggle + steering fixes (verified + APPROVED)
Rendering revision: per-frame body radius recompute (stale-radius fix)
Rendering revision: shader-based nearest-star Lambert lighting; removed Godot light nodes
Refactor: UniRenderer->PostProcessRenderer, RenderBridge->WorldRenderer, folder-aligned namespaces, dead shaders deleted
Refactor: dropped Universe namespace/folder; core+Math global; Math->Scripts/Math/

remaining_tasks.name: Wave 4: Full minimal HUD — adaptive speed units (HUD-01/D-10), context label tier+nearest body (HUD-02/D-11), cycle-able target readout + off-screen edge marker (HUD-04/D-12), phosphor-green CRT styling (D-09). Composes TRV-01.

human_actions_pending.context: 01-04 is non-autonomous with checkpoints; HUD changes are visual and need human verification

decisions.decision: Throttle is bidirectional [-1,1] (W forward / S reverse / X full-stop, all eased)
decisions.rationale: User-approved refinement of locked D-03 — user wanted reverse flight

decisions.decision: Body lighting done entirely in shader (Shaders/body_lit.gdshader), nearest-star Lambert, no Godot light nodes
decisions.rationale: OmniLight(Star space) vs DirectionalLight(Planet space) made shading character change across the SOI; shader is consistent in every space

decisions.decision: In-planet-space: terminator-only via shader, no visible sun mesh
decisions.rationale: Sun at 1 AU is ~15x beyond the planet-space far plane; faithful visible sun deferred to the Phase 3 tiered/skybox renderer

decisions.decision: Body mesh radius recomputed every frame from current scale/factor (WorldRenderer)
decisions.rationale: Radius cached at mesh creation rendered planets ~10000x too large after an SOI scale change (the 'giant blue ball' / 'planet gone')

decisions.decision: Dropped Universe namespace/folder; core sim + Math now global; Math moved to Scripts/Math/
decisions.rationale: User request; Render/Flight/Hud keep folder-aligned namespaces; Math kept global (not literally named Math) to avoid System.Math collision

decisions.decision: Worktrees auto-degraded to sequential (no origin/HEAD); plans run sequentially on main tree
decisions.rationale: worktree base-check shouldDegrade=true in this local-only repo (#683)

next_action: Run /gsd-execute-phase 01 — it targets the only remaining incomplete plan, 01-04 (Minimal HUD), dispatches a sequential gsd-executor (model sonnet, main tree), and surfaces its human-verify checkpoint(s). Finalize after the user approves; then no incomplete plans remain -> phase verification/completion.
context_notes: Phase 01 is 3/4 plans done. This session finalized 01-03, then did a chain of user-driven rendering revisions (planet-space terminator -> stale-radius fix -> brightness consistency -> fully shader-based nearest-star lighting) and a structural/namespace refactor ending in removing the Universe namespace (core sim + Math now global; Render/Flight/Hud folder-aligned). All committed, dotnet build clean, every play-test checkpoint approved. Only 01-04 (Minimal HUD) remains before phase verification. See .continue-here.md anti-patterns: per-frame scale-dependent recompute, Control mouse_filter swallowing input, and no per-space light-type switching.
